description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk featuring a flat wooden top with a natural grain pattern and a sturdy frame composed of white and black structural elements. The desk has a minimalist design, with one side supported by a solid white panel and the other by a metal frame, providing both stability and visual contrast. On one end, there are integrated open shelves divided into four compartments, ideal for storing books, office supplies, or small equipment. The opposite side is closed, giving the desk a clean and uncluttered appearance from the front. The underside of the desk includes a small black panel, possibly for modesty or cable management. The overall construction suggests a blend of wood, metal, and engineered materials, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern desk with a wooden top, white side panels, and integrated open shelving on one end. Its minimalist design combines wood and metal for a sturdy, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden top, solid white side panel on the left, and open metal frame on the right.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the wood grain surface and the small black panel beneath the desk.
description_view_2: Rear view with the wooden top, white side panel on the right, and open metal frame on the left.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the four open shelf compartments integrated into the white panel structure.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the solid white panel and open metal frame, while the shelving unit is positioned on the right side for accessible storage.
